summary: Hermes Web UI is a web application that provides a user-friendly interface for the Hermes Agent, allowing users to interact with it through a browser while maintaining all functionalities of the command line interface. It enhances productivity by retaining context across sessions and enabling self-hosted scheduling and messaging capabilities.
use_cases: Accessing Hermes Agent from a web browser for easier interaction
Managing projects and sessions with persistent memory
Scheduling automated tasks while offline and receiving updates via messaging apps
